description: Multi-turn: create dashboard -> add component -> remove component (covers `neomind dashboard add-components` + `remove-components`; high-frequency user scenario).

turns.user: Create an empty dashboard named Demo Board.
Add a text title component to it with content 'Hello World'.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind dashboard create --name 'Demo Board'`, parses id
Turn 2: Agent runs `neomind dashboard add-components <id> --components '[{...text widget...}]'` (or POST /api/dashboards/<id>/components)
Turn 3: Agent runs `neomind dashboard remove-components <id> --components '[<component_id>]'` (or DELETE equivalent), referencing the component id from turn 2
expectations.overall: Turn 3 must reuse the component id parsed in Turn 2
